description: Create a regulation doubles badminton court layout in LibreCAD using Millimeters as units. The drawing must include three layers: 'Court_Lines' (White, Continuous), 'Net_Line' (Red, Dashed), and 'Annotations' (Yellow, Continuous). Draw the court geometry using the following coordinates: an outer boundary from (0, 0) to (13400, 6100); singles sidelines at Y=460 and Y=5640 (X=0 to 13400); short service lines at X=4720 and X=8680 (Y=0 to 6100); doubles service lines at X=760 and X=12640 (Y=0 to 6100); and a center line at Y=3050 within the service courts (X=0 to 4720 and X=8680 to 13400). Add a net line at X=6700 extending from Y=-500 to Y=6600 on the 'Net_Line' layer. Include the text "NET" near the net line and "SERVICE LINE" near one of the service lines on the 'Annotations' layer. Save the final drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/badminton_court.dxf.
